events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love to a drumming icon! Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday, still bringing that unmistakable beat to the world. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-rocking anthems to astrophysicist, a true legend. What's your top Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock's Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Still Jagger-ing on at 83! The legendary Mick Jagger celebrates another year. What's the ultimate Stones track that always gets you moving?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with its first music video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched with the ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it? Or did it just change the game forever?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Landmark
angles.copy: 22 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people descended on a farm in New York for Woodstock. Which iconic performance from the festival would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His legacy lives on. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering 2Pac
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed on this day. His words and music continue to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Tribute to a Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us on this day. His electrifying guitar work changed music forever. What's your essential Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on this day in 1969.

angles.name: The Ultimate Walk
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and that legendary album cover. If you could pick one track from the album to play on repeat, what would it be?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The trailblazing Pretenders frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock 'n' roll original, still as cool as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo star, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes. What's your favourite Liam moment, Oasis or solo?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine' – a timeless message of peace and hope. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple introduced the revolutionary first-generation iPod, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: The Music Revolution
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years ago, the original iPod dropped and put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many iPods did you own?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, who's your favourite Bond and what's the best 007 track?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire generations.
